The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

/Users/home/Desktop/sai teja's vs code/m.serviceRawFile:
service: isii-backend

frameworkVersion: '^4.0.0'

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'beta'}
  region: ${opt:region, 'ap-south-1'}
  architecture: x86_64
  environment:
    NODE_ENV: production
    MONGODB_URI: ${env:MONGODB_URI}
    JWT_SECRET: ${env:JWT_SECRET}
    AWS_S3_BUCKET: ${env:AWS_S3_BUCKET}
    PUBLIC_FILES_BASE_URL: ${env:PUBLIC_FILES_BASE_URL, 'https://www.isii.global/files'}
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:PutObject
            - s3:GetObject
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:s3:::${env:AWS_S3_BUCKET}/*
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:ListBucket
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:s3:::${env:AWS_S3_BUCKET}

package:
  individually: true
  patterns:
    - '!.env'
    - '!vercel.json'
    - '!api/**/[...route].js'

functions:
  auth:
    handler: api/auth/index.handler
    memorySize: 512
    timeout: 10
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /api/auth
          method: ANY
      - httpApi:
          path: /api/auth/{proxy+}
          method: ANY

  articles:
    handler: api/articles/index.handler
    memorySize: 512
    timeout: 15
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /api/articles
          method: ANY
      - httpApi:
          path: /api/articles/{proxy+}
          method: ANY

  news:
    handler: api/news/index.handler
    memorySize: 512
    timeout: 15
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /api/news
          method: ANY
      - httpApi:
          path: /api/news/{proxy+}
          method: ANY

  reports:
    handler: api/reports/index.handler
    memorySize: 512
    timeout: 15
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /api/reports
          method: ANY
      - httpApi:
          path: /api/reports/{proxy+}
          method: ANY

  upload:
    handler: api/upload/index.handler
    memorySize: 1024
    timeout: 30
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /api/upload
          method: ANY
      - httpApi:
          path: /api/upload/{proxy+}
          method: ANY
